risk_description: Incomplete enterprise asset inventory leads to unmanaged attack surface and delayed incident response.
mitigation_strategy: Complete CMDB integration and enforce automated discovery across all network segments.

risk_description: Excessive privileged access increases the likelihood of unauthorized system changes and credential abuse.
mitigation_strategy: Expand PAM coverage and implement quarterly privileged access recertification with enforcement.

risk_description: Inconsistent MFA enforcement for legacy and service access paths allows avoidable account compromise.
mitigation_strategy: Migrate legacy apps to federation and enforce conditional access for all privileged authentication.

risk_description: Cloud logging gaps reduce detection coverage for suspicious control-plane and identity activity.
mitigation_strategy: Complete cloud log onboarding and implement policy-as-code checks for mandatory audit logging.

risk_description: Weak third-party risk review may introduce vendors with inadequate security controls.
mitigation_strategy: Adopt tiered vendor due diligence and contractually require remediation of critical findings.

risk_description: Untested incident response playbooks may lead to delayed containment during high-severity events.
mitigation_strategy: Prioritize playbook testing cadence and run biannual tabletop exercises with executive participation.

risk_description: Incomplete backup recovery testing increases risk of extended outage after ransomware or system failure.
mitigation_strategy: Establish monthly recovery tests for tier-1 applications and track RTO/RPO performance.

risk_description: Missing vulnerability remediation SLAs allow exploitable weaknesses to persist in production.
mitigation_strategy: Formalize SLA policy by severity and implement exception approval workflow with leadership oversight.

risk_description: Unclear data classification causes inconsistent protection for sensitive information across repositories.
mitigation_strategy: Roll out data labeling controls and train data owners on handling requirements.

risk_description: Limited executive visibility into security posture delays risk-informed funding and prioritization decisions.
mitigation_strategy: Publish monthly cyber risk scorecard with trend metrics and key control exceptions.

risk_description: Insufficient behavioral analytics limits detection of compromised insider or service accounts.
mitigation_strategy: Deploy UEBA for privileged users and integrate high-confidence alerts into SOC triage.

risk_description: Delayed post-incident corrective actions enable repeat incidents from known root causes.
mitigation_strategy: Institute action tracking with deadlines and executive escalation for overdue items.

risk_description: Data retention and immutable backup controls are not uniformly enforced across business units.
mitigation_strategy: Standardize retention policy implementation and validate immutability in quarterly audits.

risk_description: Outdated incident communication procedures could result in inconsistent stakeholder messaging.
mitigation_strategy: Review and refresh communication protocol with legal and executive stakeholders.

risk_description: Periodic internet attack surface scans miss newly exposed assets between scan windows.
mitigation_strategy: Integrate continuous external attack surface monitoring and alerting.
